description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a modern, open-plan interior layout. The front facade includes a small porch area with two raised garden beds flanking a central walkway, leading to a double-door entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The interior is divided into distinct rooms, including a bedroom, living area, and bathroom, all visible through the open roof. Two large deciduous trees are positioned symmetrically on either side of the house, enhancing the suburban residential feel. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by wooden accents and green landscaping elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a small front porch, and symmetrical landscaping with two trees and garden beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, double-door entrance, raised garden beds, and symmetrical trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, side windows, and one tree partially obscuring the garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with windows and the interior room layout, with both trees visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side and back windows, the porch from the side, and one tree in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
